CustomField.description: Denormalized copy of CursorBatch_Config__mdt.MasterLabel for the matching configuration. Refreshed each time a job for this config is started, so renaming the config label is reflected on the next run.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Display label of the matching CursorBatch_Config__mdt record. Updated automatically by the framework on each parent upsert.
CustomField.label: Config Label
